variant: 10,000 lb capacity clear floor two-post lift

installation_requirements.base_footprint: 30 in wide, constructed from 3/4 in thick plate
installation_requirements.hydraulic_lines: Adjustable overhead stainless steel (or in-floor option)
installation_requirements.minimum_ceiling_height: 10 ft 6 in (to fully raise 4 ft tall car)

specifications.cylinder_type: Twin cylinder with heavy duty #646 leaf chains and twin bearings
specifications.column_material: 3/4 inch thick forklift mast steel, 5-3/4 inch wide
specifications.synchronization: Patented hydraulic synchronization with overhead or in-floor stainless steel lines

features: 10,000 lb capacity for cars and light trucks
Clear floor design with patented hydraulic synchronization
3-1/2 inch low profile swing arms fit under lowest sports cars
Twin heavy duty cylinders with #646 leaf chains
8 x 5-3/4 inch double-sealed self-lubricating steel ball bearing rollers per carriage
3/4-inch thick forklift mast columns, 5-3/4 inch wide
All-position mechanical locks every 3 inches starting at 5 inches off ground
No obstructive cable cover - fits 10 ft 6 in ceiling
Adjustable overhead stainless steel hydraulic lines
1-1/8 inch diameter swing arm bolts (10,000 through 30,000 lb models)
Standard 3-inch and 6-inch truck frame adaptors included
certifications: Meets nationally recognized safety standard for garage lifts
Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
safety_features: All-position mechanical locks engage every 3 inches in both columns
Locks start at 5 inches off ground and continue to full height
Automatic swing arm restraints engage upon lifting
Restraints disengage only when vehicle fully lowered
notes: Warranty: 25 years structural, 10 year mechanical, limited lifetime cylinder seal
Indoor use only - outdoor installation prohibited
